console-logging.rationale: Pattern found in 1 files across the project.

usestate-hook.rationale: useState hook used in 5 files for local component state management.

alternatives.recommendation: Consider using "useState hook" instead (5 vs 4 occurrences)
Consider using "useState hook" instead (5 vs 2 occurrences)
Consider using "useState hook" instead (5 vs 1 occurrences)

custom-hook-use-pattern.rationale: Custom hooks (use* pattern) found in 4 files. Reusable stateful logic across components.
custom-hook-use-pattern.example:
const response = await fetch(`${DRIVE_API}?${params}`);
	if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}`);

useeffect-hook.rationale: useEffect hook used in 2 files for side effects and lifecycle management.
useeffect-hook.example:
const response = await fetch(`${DRIVE_API}?${params}`);
	if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}`);

useref-hook.rationale: useRef used in 1 files for DOM refs or mutable values that don't trigger re-renders.

fetch-api.rationale: Native Fetch API used in 1 files for HTTP requests.
fetch-api.example:
const response = await fetch(`${DRIVE_API}?${params}`);
	if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}`);
